footer.disclaimer: All reviews are anonymous and reflect personal experiences, not statements of fact or legal advice.

hero.subtitle: Transparency in the rental market: see how landlords behave and share your experience.

input.message2: Your opinions help build a more transparent rental market
input.message3: Share your experience with other tenants
input.selectAddressError: Please select an address from the list to continue

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Text: Enter the listing address to see reviews.
howItWorks.step2Text: Add an anonymous opinion about your landlord.
howItWorks.step3Text: Your review helps guide other tenants.

chromeExtension.title: Install our extension
chromeExtension.description: Check landlords directly while browsing rental portals. Our extension detects the owner and shows you reviews without leaving the page.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: CaseroOk is a platform where tenants anonymously share their experiences with landlords to help others make informed decisions.
faq.a2: No. We never show names, phone numbers, or emails. We only store an anonymous hash to group reviews from the same landlord.
faq.a3: Reviews are tenants' subjective experiences and are protected by freedom of expression. They are not legal complaints or legal statements.
faq.q4: How do I leave my review?
faq.a4: Search for the property address and complete the form. You can also use the browser extension that automatically detects listing data.
faq.q5: What if I see inappropriate content?
faq.a5: We have moderation and terms of use that prohibit defamatory or illegal content. If you find something like that, you can report it and we will review it.

step2.yearsQuestion: How many years have you lived in this flat?
step2.currentlyLivingQuestion: Are you still living in the flat?
step2.monthlyRentLabel: How much do you pay per month for rent? (€)

step3.propertyOpinionPlaceholder: Share your experience and opinion about the flat...

step4.communityOpinionLabel: Your opinion about the community and neighborhood
step4.communityOpinionPlaceholder: Share your experience and opinion about the community and neighborhood...

step5.opinionPlaceholder: Describe your experience honestly, respectfully, and based on real facts. Avoid personal data, insults, or threats.
step5.acceptTermsPrefix: I have read and accept the
step5.privacyModalDescription: This is the hashed value stored in our database:

staticMessages.step1Message: The information you share will not be shown exactly as entered.
staticMessages.step2Message: Indicate the period you have lived or are living in the property to contextualize your opinion.
staticMessages.step3Message: Evaluate the flat's condition to help future tenants make informed decisions.
staticMessages.step4Message: Information about the building community and neighborhood is very valuable for future tenants.
staticMessages.step5Message: Personal data is processed with irreversible hashing only to associate opinions with owners. It is never stored in plain text or shared with third parties.

login.infoItem3: Will let you edit it if needed

blogList.seoDescription: Guides and updates on safer renting, housing, and tenant experiences in Spain.
blogList.title: Stories and guides for informed tenants
blogList.intro: Every week we analyze housing news and turn it into practical, original articles.
blogList.emptyTitle: Our first article is coming soon
blogList.emptyDescription: We are preparing original content about renting, co-living, and tenant rights.
blogList.emptyByLanguageDescription: Articles are always kept in their original language. Switch language to see other available content.

blogPost.notFoundDescription: Check the URL or go back to the blog list to keep reading.
blogPost.shareDescription: At CaseroOk we turn news and real stories into practical resources for tenants. If you want to contribute your story, you can post an anonymous review in minutes.

seo.title: Rental reviews by city | CaseroOk
seo.description: Explore verified tenant reviews grouped by city. Pick your area and check real experiences before renting.

legalHub.seoDescription: Legal documentation and terms for CaseroOk.
legalHub.title: Terms and conditions

legalNotice.title: Legal notice
legalNotice.siteOwnerBody: This website is owned by {{ownerName}}, with registered address in {{cityCountry}}. Contact: {{contactEmail}}.
legalNotice.purposeBody: This site offers a blog/platform with tenant opinions about rental experiences, including features to publish and consult anonymous reviews.
legalNotice.intellectualPropertyBody: Own content (brand, logo, text, code) belongs to {{projectName}} or its authors and is protected by intellectual property regulations. Use of the site does not grant any license over these rights.
legalNotice.contentLiabilityBody: Published opinions are the sole responsibility of their authors. {{projectName}} may moderate or remove content that violates these conditions, the law, or principles of respect.
legalNotice.linksBody: This site may include links to third-party websites without implying responsibility for their content.
legalNotice.availabilityBody: Continuity of service or absence of errors is not guaranteed. We will try to resolve issues as diligently as possible.
legalNotice.lawBody: Spanish law applies. For any dispute, the parties submit to the Courts of {{jurisdictionCity}}, unless mandatory law states otherwise.

privacyPolicy.seoDescription: How we process your personal data at CaseroOk.
privacyPolicy.title: Privacy policy
privacyPolicy.section2Lead1Strong: Data provided by users who post reviews:
privacyPolicy.section2Lead1: review text, rating, and minimum anti-spam technical metadata (e.g., IP/UA).
privacyPolicy.section2Lead2Strong: Landlord/manager identifiers to deduplicate and group reviews:
privacyPolicy.section2Bullet1: We do not store personal data in plain text (name, phone, email).
privacyPolicy.section2Bullet2: We store only an irreversible hash (e.g., SHA-256) of normalized data (e.g., normalized phone or email).
privacyPolicy.section2Bullet3: The hash is computed on your device (frontend or extension) and only the hash is sent, never the original value.
privacyPolicy.section2Lead3Strong: Usage/analytics data (only if analytics is enabled with consent):
privacyPolicy.section3Body1: Voluntary user submission when posting a review.
privacyPolicy.section3Body2: Browser extension (Chrome/Firefox): only captures information visible on pages such as Idealista; computes the hash locally and queries the backend with that hash. It does not perform mass scraping or download personal data in plain text.
privacyPolicy.section4Bullet2: Group reviews by landlord/manager using hashes to avoid duplicates and improve search.
privacyPolicy.section4Bullet3: Abuse and spam prevention (rate limiting, technical signals).
privacyPolicy.section5Body1: Consent of the user submitting the review.
privacyPolicy.section5Body2: Legitimate interest (GDPR art. 6.1.f) for moderation, security, hash-based deduplication, and proper service operation. No automated decisions with legal effects are used.
privacyPolicy.section6Body: We do not share data with third parties except when legally required. We use infrastructure providers acting as processors (e.g., Supabase, {{hostingProvider}}), under GDPR-compliant contracts. International transfers may occur; in that case we apply appropriate safeguards (EU Standard Contractual Clauses).
privacyPolicy.section7Bullet1: Reviews and hashes: while the service is active or until you request deletion/blocking.
privacyPolicy.section8Body: You can request access, rectification, deletion, objection, restriction, and portability by writing to {{contactEmail}}. Note on hashes: since we do not store the original value, deletion is performed by blocking or deleting the associated hash. If you are an affected third party (e.g., landlord) and believe indirect identification exists, contact us to block the hash and de-index grouping.
privacyPolicy.section9Body: The service is not intended for minors under 14 years old. Submissions from minors are not accepted.
privacyPolicy.section10Body: We may update this policy. We will publish the current version with its update date.

cookiesPolicy.seoDescription: Information about cookie usage at CaseroOk.
cookiesPolicy.title: Cookies policy
cookiesPolicy.section1Bullet1: essential for the website to work (session, security, basic preferences).
cookiesPolicy.section1Bullet2: only if you give consent in the banner; used to measure usage and improve the experience.
cookiesPolicy.section1Body: We do not use cookies to display personal data.
cookiesPolicy.section2Prefix: On your first visit we show a banner to accept, reject, or configure non-essential cookies. You can change your choice at
cookiesPolicy.section3Title: How to manage cookies in your browser
cookiesPolicy.section3Body: You can allow, block, or delete cookies from your browser settings.
cookiesPolicy.section4Body: If you enable analytics, we may use {{analyticsProvider}}.

termsOfUse.title: Terms of use
termsOfUse.section1Body: Regulate access to and use of {{projectName}}, a platform/blog for anonymous reviews about rental experiences.
termsOfUse.section2Body: The user is responsible for the truthfulness of what they publish and for complying with these rules.
termsOfUse.section3Bullet1: It is strictly forbidden to publish in free text personal data of third parties in plain text (full name, phone, email, exact address, or other identifiers).
termsOfUse.section3Bullet2: Insulting or defamatory language, hate speech, or incitement to violence.
termsOfUse.section3Bullet3: False information or content that infringes third-party rights.
termsOfUse.section4Body1: To group reviews of the same landlord/manager and avoid duplicates, the system may ask users to enter a landlord phone or email only in designated fields.
termsOfUse.section4Body2: That value is NEVER sent in plain text: it is normalized and hashed locally (e.g., SHA-256), and only the hash is sent.
termsOfUse.section4Body3: Publishing those values in review text or other visible fields is prohibited.
termsOfUse.section4Body4: The user agrees not to attempt re-identification or use hashes for purposes other than consultation within the service.
termsOfUse.section5Bullet1: Only processes information visible on sites such as Idealista.
termsOfUse.section5Bullet2: Computes a local hash and queries the backend with that hash to show whether related reviews exist.
termsOfUse.section5Bullet3: Does not download or store personal data in plain text.
termsOfUse.section6Body: We may moderate, hide, or remove content that breaches these conditions or the law. You can contact {{contactEmail}} to report abuse or request review.
termsOfUse.section7Body: Reviews are the responsibility of their authors. {{projectName}} does not guarantee accuracy and assumes no liability for decisions made based on reviews.
termsOfUse.section8Body: The user guarantees they have rights to publish their content and grants {{projectName}} a non-exclusive, free license to host and display it.
termsOfUse.section9Body: We may suspend accounts or publications for serious or repeated breaches.
termsOfUse.section10Body: Spanish law; jurisdiction of {{jurisdictionCity}}, unless mandatory law provides otherwise.

goodPractices.title: Best practices protocol
goodPractices.introTitle: To keep a useful and respectful space:
goodPractices.yesBullet1: Describe specific facts from your experience as a tenant.
goodPractices.yesBullet2: Be honest, respectful, and specific (approximate dates, objective incidents).
goodPractices.yesBullet3Intro: If you add a landlord phone/email in designated fields, keep in mind that:
goodPractices.yesBullet3a: It is normalized and hashed (e.g., SHA-256) on your device.
goodPractices.yesBullet3b: The original value is never stored.
goodPractices.yesBullet3c: The hash is only used to group reviews and match with platforms such as Idealista through the browser extension.
goodPractices.noBullet1: Include plain personal data in the review text.
goodPractices.noBullet2: Insults, disqualifications, rumors, or baseless accusations.
goodPractices.reportBody: If you find content that violates these rules, write to {{contactEmail}} including the URL and reason. We prioritize those reports.
